name: Cabbage Hamburger Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and drain.
2. Add onion, mango pepper, and tomato sauce. Stir in cumin, oregano, salt, and garlic.
3. Cut cabbage into cubes and mix to separate pieces slightly.
4. Add the cabbage to the skillet.
5. Cover and simmer for 10-20 minutes.
